016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
021
022/**
023 * Result of `gettxoutsetinfo`
024 */
025public class TxOutSetInfo {
026    private final int height;
027    private final Sha256Hash bestBlock;
028    private final long transactions;
029    private final long txOuts;
030    private final long bogoSize;
031    private final Sha256Hash hashSerialized2;
032    private final Sha256Hash hashSerialized3;
033    private final long diskSize;
034    private final Coin totalAmount;
035
036
037    public TxOutSetInfo(@JsonProperty("height")             int         height,
038                        @JsonProperty("bestblock")          Sha256Hash  bestBlock,
039                        @JsonProperty("transactions")       long        transactions,
040                        @JsonProperty("txouts")             long        txOuts,
041                        @JsonProperty("bogosize")           long        bogoSize,
042                        @JsonProperty("hash_serialized_2")  Sha256Hash  hashSerialized2,
043                        @JsonProperty("hash_serialized_3")  Sha256Hash  hashSerialized3,
044                        @JsonProperty("disk_size")          long        diskSize,
045                        @JsonProperty("total_amount")       Coin        totalAmount) {
046        this.height = height;
047        this.bestBlock = bestBlock;
048        this.transactions = transactions;
049        this.txOuts = txOuts;
050        this.bogoSize = bogoSize;
051        this.hashSerialized2 = hashSerialized2;
052        this.hashSerialized3 = hashSerialized3;
053        this.diskSize = diskSize;
054        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;
055    }
056
057    public int getHeight() {
058        return height;
059    }
060
061    public Sha256Hash getBestBlock() {
062        return bestBlock;
063    }
064
065    public long getTransactions() {
066        return transactions;
067    }
068
069    public long getTxOuts() {
070        return txOuts;
071    }
072
073    public long getBogoSize() {
074        return bogoSize;
075    }
076
077    public Sha256Hash getHashSerialized2() {
078        return hashSerialized2;
079    }
080
081    public Sha256Hash getHashSerialized3() {
082        return hashSerialized3;
083    }
084
085    public long getDiskSize() {
086        return diskSize;
087    }
088
089    public Coin getTotalAmount() {
090        return totalAmount;
091    }
092}
